{{Quote|I'll slow things down as much as I can. Now get out of here before someone spots you.|Dagrus Rhine|<ref name="SWG:AED" />}}
'''Dagrus Rhine''' was a corrupt [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Rhine was bribed several times by local criminal [[Kritus Morven]]. When Morven learned that the Royal Security Forces had started to search for his [[Spice/Legends|spice]] refineries, Morven tasked a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] with delivering an authorization of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to Rhine, who would be waiting outside of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. In return, Rhine slowed the search down as much as he could, giving Morven the time to evacuate his refinery before it could be discovered.<ref name="SWG:AED" />

Rhine was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and a light skin tone. He wore purple and gray [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]].<ref name="SWG:AED" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dagrus Rhine was a non-player character (NPC) in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' who would spawn somewhere outside of Keren during [[W:c:swg:Kritus Morven|Kritus Morven's]] third [[W:c:swg:Quest|quest]]. Rhine spawned under the generic "rsf_security_guard" template rather than having a randomized appearance, resulting in a consistent model that was typically assigned to Human female NPCs while also being referred to with he/him pronouns.<ref name="SWG:AED" />
